info.title: Platform V2 API
info.description:
# Platform V2 API

Multi-tenant cloud security platform: AWS inventory collection, policy evaluation,
findings, and CIS compliance scoring.

**Interactive docs:** `/docs` (Swagger UI) · `/redoc` (ReDoc) · `/openapi.json`

---

## Authentication

Production and local dev (default) use **Supabase JWT**. The API validates the
`Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` header via Supabase JWKS (ES256).

### Step 1 — Get a Supabase access token

```http
POST https://<project-ref>.supabase.co/auth/v1/token?grant_type=password
apikey: <SUPABASE_ANON_KEY>
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "email": "admin@drantiq.local",
  "password": "password123"
}
```

Response field: `access_token` (JWT, ~1 hour TTL).

### Step 2 — Call Platform API

```http
GET http://localhost:8090/v1/me
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

The API resolves `sub` + `iss` from the JWT against `platform.tenant_memberships`
and applies Postgres RLS for the tenant.

### Test users (dev)

| Email | Role | Use for |
|-------|------|---------|
| `admin@drantiq.local` | `tenant_admin` | platform-ui — scans, integrations |
| `user@drantiq.local` | `viewer` | Read-only |
| `ops@drantiq.local` | `super_admin` | admin-ui — `/v1/admin/*` |

Membership must exist in `platform.tenant_memberships` (seed via
`scripts/seed_identity_membership.py`).

### Swagger UI

1. Open **Authorize** (top right)
2. **SupabaseJWT** → paste `access_token` only (no `Bearer` prefix)
3. Try **GET /v1/me** to confirm

### Dev header auth (optional)

When `DEV_TENANT_HEADER_AUTH=true` on the backend, you may skip JWT and send:

| Header | Example |
|--------|---------|
| `X-Tenant-ID` | Tenant UUID |
| `X-Role` | `tenant_admin` · `viewer` · `super_admin` |

Use **DevHeaders** scheme in Authorize for local testing without Supabase.

---

## Scan lifecycle

```
POST /v1/scans → Redis collect queue → collector → S3 bronze → ingest → policy → findings → CIS
```

Statuses: `created` → `queued` → `collecting` → `ingesting` → `inventory_ready` →
`evaluating` → `completed` | `completed_with_errors` | `failed`

Poll **GET /v1/scans/{id}** until terminal state before reading findings/assets.

---

## Roles

| Role | Access |
|------|--------|
| `viewer` | Read scans, assets, findings, compliance |
| `tenant_admin` | + create integrations, trigger scans |
| `super_admin` | + `/v1/admin/*` cross-tenant ops |

---

## Postman

Import `postman/Platform-V2-API.postman_collection.json` and run
`python scripts/sync_postman_env.py` to refresh tokens from `.env`.

get.description: Returns `healthy` if the API process is running. Used by load balancers and k8s liveness checks. **No auth.**
Checks Postgres and Redis connectivity. Returns 503 if either dependency is down. Use before running E2E tests. **No auth.**

Returns the authenticated principal resolved from Supabase JWT or dev headers. **Use this first** after Authorize in Swagger to confirm token and membership.

- **401** — missing or invalid Bearer token
- **403** — JWT valid but no row in `platform.tenant_memberships`

403.description: User not provisioned for any tenant

post.description:
Connect a customer AWS account via cross-account IAM role + external ID. Requires **tenant_admin** or **super_admin**.

Customer must trust the hub account and grant read-only permissions. `external_id` is stored encrypted and never returned in responses.

- **409** — integration already exists for this account
- **400** — validation error (account_id, regions, external_id length)

get.description: All integrations for the authenticated tenant. Use `id` when calling **POST /v1/scans**.

schema.title: Response List Integrations V1 Integrations Get

post.description:
Starts a new security scan for the given integration. Enqueues a job on `platform:collect.aws`; workers collect AWS inventory to S3, ingest assets, evaluate policies, and compute CIS score.

Requires **tenant_admin** or **super_admin**. Poll **GET /v1/scans/{id}** until status is `completed`, `completed_with_errors`, or `failed` before reading findings.

get.description: Recent scans for the tenant, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Scans V1 Scans Get

get.description: Append-only collection/policy events for the scan (from `assets.collection_events`).

schema.title: Response Get Scan Timeline V1 Scans  Scan Id  Timeline Get

get.description: Scan status, account_id, collection sub-status, and error payload if failed.
Weighted CIS AWS v6 score and control summary for the scan. Same data as compliance framework endpoint, compact shape.

schema.title: Response Get Scan Compliance Summary V1 Scans  Scan Id  Compliance Get

404.description: Scan or compliance results not found

get.description: Ops metric: expected vs collected resource types for the scan.

schema.title: Response Get Inventory Completeness V1 Scans  Scan Id  Inventory Completeness Get

get.description: Which of the ~35 YAML policies were evaluated vs skipped for this scan.

schema.title: Response Get Policy Coverage V1 Scans  Scan Id  Policy Coverage Get

get.description: Paginated inventory for a completed scan. Filter by `resource_type` optionally.

schema.title: Response List Assets V1 Assets Get

get.description: Full-text search over resource properties and tags for a scan. Requires `q` and/or `type` and/or `tag`.

parameters.name: tag

schema.description: Tag filter as key or key=value
schema.title: Tag

parameters.description: Tag filter as key or key=value

schema.title: Response Search Assets V1 Assets Search Get

get.description: One resource by `resource_id` for the given scan.
IAM graph edges (e.g. role → policy attachment) for a resource in the scan.

schema.title: Response Get Asset Relationships V1 Assets  Resource Id  Relationships Get

get.description: Policy evaluation results for a scan. Filter by `result=fail` for issues only. Includes remediation copy from policy YAML catalog.

schema.title: Response List Findings V1 Findings Get

get.description: Single finding with full remediation block. Requires `scan_id` query param for tenant scoping.
Available frameworks with mapped policies (currently CIS AWS v6).

schema.title: Response List Frameworks V1 Compliance Frameworks Get

get.description: Full compliance result: score, per-control status, linked findings. Used by platform-ui CIS tab.
Cross-tenant counts: tenants, failed/active scans, Redis queue depths. **super_admin only.** Login as ops@drantiq.local.
Cross-tenant list for admin-ui. **super_admin only.**

schema.title: Response List Tenants V1 Admin Tenants Get

post.description: Provision a new customer tenant. Slug must be unique lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens.

get.description: Single tenant by UUID.
Supabase/OIDC users linked to tenant with roles.

schema.title: Response List Memberships V1 Admin Tenants  Tenant Id  Memberships Get

post.description: Link Supabase user (`auth_issuer` + `auth_subject` from JWT) to tenant. Issuer is typically `https://<project>.supabase.co/auth/v1`.

get.description: Recent scans across all tenants. Filter `?status=failed` for ops triage.

schema.title: Response List Admin Scans V1 Admin Scans Get

get.description: Same as tenant-scoped integrations list but callable by super_admin for any tenant.

schema.title: Response List Tenant Integrations V1 Admin Tenants  Tenant Id  Integrations Get

get.description: Recent scans for one tenant from admin-ui tenant detail.

schema.title: Response List Tenant Scans V1 Admin Tenants  Tenant Id  Scans Get

post.description: Ops-initiated scan from admin-ui tenant detail. Same pipeline as POST /v1/scans.

role_arn.title: Role Arn
role_arn.description: Customer IAM role ARN the hub account can AssumeRole into

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: STS external ID (encrypted at rest, min 8 chars)

email.title: Email
email.description: Email from JWT or users table

SupabaseJWT.description: Supabase `access_token` from POST .../auth/v1/token?grant_type=password. Paste token only in Authorize dialog.

DevRole.name: X-Role
DevRole.description: tenant_admin | viewer | super_admin. Pair with DevTenantId.

tags.name: health
tags.description: Liveness and readiness probes. No authentication required.

tags.name: identity
tags.description: Current user profile from JWT or dev headers. Use to verify auth setup.

tags.name: integrations
tags.description: AWS account connections (AssumeRole + external ID). Requires `tenant_admin` or `super_admin` to register.

tags.name: scans
tags.description: Scan orchestration: trigger collection, poll status, timeline, CIS summary, inventory completeness, policy coverage.

tags.name: assets
tags.description: Versioned inventory per scan. Resources and IAM relationships from bronze ingest.

tags.name: findings
tags.description: Policy evaluation results with remediation metadata (AWS CLI, Terraform, risk copy). Keyed by `policy_id` (e.g. AWS_S3_001).

tags.name: compliance
tags.description: CIS AWS v6 framework mapping — control matrix and weighted score per scan.

tags.name: admin
tags.description: Internal ops (`super_admin` only): tenants, memberships, cross-tenant scans, queue depth overview.
